<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Start scraping"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/scrape/{scrapeId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Starts a scraping job with the specified configuration ID

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"scrapeId","required":true,"in":"path","description":"The ID of the scrape configuration to execute","schema":{"example":"amazon-orders","type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Scraping started successfully","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"status":{"type":"string","example":"running"},"scrapeId":{"type":"string","example":"amazon-orders"}}}}}},"404":{"description":"Scrape configuration not found"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
